      have h₁₆ : ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, a n ∈ Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) := by
        have h₁₇ : Filter.Tendsto a Filter.atTop (nhds La) := h₅
        have h₁₈ : (La : ℝ) < Lb := by linarith
        have h₁₉ : 0 < (Lb - La : ℝ) := by linarith
        have h₂₀ : Filter.Tendsto a Filter.atTop (nhds La) := h₅
        have h₂₁ : (La - (Lb - La) : ℝ) < La + (Lb - La) := by linarith
        have h₂₂ : Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) ∈ nhds La := by
          apply IsOpen.mem_nhds isOpen_Ioo
          <;> simp_all [abs_lt]
          <;> linarith
        have h₂₃ : Filter.Tendsto a Filter.atTop (nhds La) := h₅
        have h₂₄ : ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, a n ∈ Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) := by
          have h₂₅ : Filter.Tendsto a Filter.atTop (nhds La) := h₅
          have h₂₆ : Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) ∈ nhds La := h₂₂
          have h₂₇ : ∃ (N : ℕ), ∀ n : ℕ, n ≥ N → a n ∈ Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) := by
            have h₂₈ : Filter.Tendsto a Filter.atTop (nhds La) := h₅
            have h₂₉ : Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) ∈ nhds La := h₂₂
            exact Metric.tendsto_atTop.mp h₂₈ (Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La))) h₂₉
          exact h₂₇
        exact h₂₄
      obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := h₁₆
      have h₂₅ : ∀ n ≥ N, a n ∈ Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) := hN
      have h₂₆ : a N ∈ Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) := h₂₅ N (by linarith)
      have h₂₇ : a N < La + (Lb - La) := h₂₆.2
      have h₂₈ : a N > La - (Lb - La) := h₂₆.1
      have h₂₉ : a N ≥ Lb := by
        have h₃₀ : ∀ n, a n ≤ Lb := h₆
        have h₃₁ : a N ≤ Lb := h₃₀ N
        have h₃₂ : a N ≥ Lb := by
          by_contra h₃₃
          have h₃₄ : a N < Lb := by linarith
          have h₃₅ : a N ≤ Lb := h₃₀ N
          have h₃₆ : ∀ n, a n ≤ Lb := h₆
          have h₃₇ : a N < Lb := by linarith
          have h₃₈ : ∀ n ≥ N, a n ∈ Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) := h₂₅
          have h₃₉ : ∀ n ≥ N, a n < La + (Lb - La) := by
            intro n hn
            have h₄₀ : a n ∈ Set.Ioo (La - (Lb - La)) (La + (Lb - La)) := h₃₈ n hn
            exact h₄₀.2
          have h₄₁ : a N < La + (Lb - La) := h₃₉ N (by linarith)
          have h₄₂ : a N > La - (Lb - La) := h₂₆.1
          have h₄₃ : a N < Lb := by linarith
          have h₄₄ : a N < Lb := by linarith
          linarith
        linarith
      linarith
    exact h₁₃
  linarith

simpa using h₁₄
      have h₁₄ : Lb ≤ La := by
        have h₁₅ : a ≤ fun _ => Lb := h₄
        have h₁₆ : ∀ n, a n ≤ Lb := by
          intro n
          have h₁₇ : a n ≤ (fun _ => Lb) n := h₅ n
          simpa using h₁₇
        have h₁₇ : Lb ≤ La := by
          -- Use the fact that the limit of a is less than or equal to the least upper bound
          have h₁₈ : ∀ n, a n ≤ Lb := h₁₆
          have h₁₉ : a ≤ fun _ => Lb := h₄
          have h₂₀ : SeqLim a La := hLa
          have h₂₁ : ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N, ∀ n ≥ N, |a n - La| < ε := by
            rw [Metric.tendsto_atTop] at h₂₀
            intro ε εpos
            obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := h₂₀ ε εpos
            exact ⟨N, fun n hn => hN n hn⟩
          -- Use the fact that the limit of a is less than or equal to the least upper bound
          by_contra h
          have h₂₂ : La < Lb := by linarith
          have h₂₃ : ∃ ε > 0, ∀ N, ∃ n ≥ N, a n ≥ La + ε := by
            use (Lb - La) / 2
            constructor
            · linarith
            · intro N
              -- Since a is increasing and a_n ≤ Lb for all n, we can find a contradiction
              -- if we assume that a_n < Lb for all n.
              use n
              <;> simp_all [abs_lt]
              <;> linarith
          obtain ⟨ε, εpos, hε⟩ := h₂₃
          have h₂₄ := hε 0
          obtain ⟨n, hn, h₂₅⟩ := h₂₄
          have h₂₆ := h₂₁ ε εpos
          obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := h₂₆
          have h₂₇ := hN (n + N) (by linarith)
          have h₂₈ : a (n + N) ≥ La + ε := by
            have h₂₉ := hε (n + N)
            have h₃₀ := h₂₉
            linarith
          have h₃₁ : |a (n + N) - La| < ε := by
            exact hN (n + N) (by linarith)
          have h₃₂ : a (n + N) - La < ε := by
            rw [abs_lt] at h₃₁
            linarith
          linarith
        exact h₁₇
      exact h₁₄
    linarith
  exact h₈

sequence `a_n` is Cauchy and converges to `La`
      -- and the sequence `b_n` is Cauchy and converges to `L

simp
      · have h₃ : a (n + N) ≤ a (n + N + 1) := aMono (by linarith)
        linarith
    have h₃ : ∀ N : ℕ, a (n + N) ≤ La := by
      intro N
      have h₄ : Filter.Tendsto (fun m : ℕ => a (n + m)) Filter.atTop (nhds La) := by
        have h₅ : Filter.Tendsto a Filter.atTop (nhds La) := hLa.tendsto
        have h₆ : Filter.Tendsto (fun m : ℕ => a (n + m)) Filter.atTop (nhds La) :=
          h₅.comp (Filter.tendsto_add_atTop_nat n)
        exact h₆
      have h₅ : ∀ᶠ (m : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, a (n + m) ∈ Set.Icc (La - 1) (La + 1) := by
        have h₆ : Filter.Tendsto (fun m : ℕ => a (n + m)) Filter.atTop (nhds La) := h₄
        have h₇ : Set.Icc (La - 1) (La + 1) ∈ nhds La := by
          apply IsOpen.mem_nhds isOpen_Icc
          norm_num [abs_lt]
          <;>
          (try norm_num) <;>
          (try linarith) <;>
          (try
            {
              cases' le_total 0 (La - 1) with h h <;>
              cases' le_total 0 (La + 1) with h' h' <;>
              simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, le_of_lt] <;>
              linarith
            })
        filter_upwards [h₇] with y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_Icc] at hy ⊢
        <;>
        (try simp_all) <;>
        (try linarith)
      have h₆ : a (n + N) ≤ La := by
        by_contra h
        have h₇ : a (n + N) > La := by linarith
        have h₈ : ∀ᶠ (m : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, a (n + m) ≤ La := by
          filter_upwards [h₄.eventually (gt_mem_nhds h₇)] with m hm
          linarith
        have h₉ : ∀ᶠ (m : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, m ≥ N → a (n + m) ≤ La := by
          filter_upwards [h₈] with m hm
          intro hm'
          linarith
        have h₁₀ : ∃ (m : ℕ), m ≥ N ∧ a (n + m) > La := by
          use N
          <;> simp_all [h₇]
          <;>
          (try linarith)
          <;>
          (try
            {
              cases' le_total 0 (La - 1) with h h <;>
              cases' le_total 0 (La + 1) with h' h' <;>
              simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, abs_of_nonpos, le_of_lt] <;>
              linarith
            })
        obtain ⟨m, hm₁, hm₂⟩ := h₁₀
        have h₁₁ : ∀ᶠ (m : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, m ≥ N → a (n + m) ≤ La := h₉
        have h₁₂ : m ≥ N := hm₁
        have h₁₃ : a (n + m) ≤ La := by
          filter_upwards [h₁₁] with m hm
          exact hm h₁₂
        linarith
      exact h₆
    have h₄ : a n ≤ La := by
      by_contra h
      have h₅ : a n > La := by linarith
      have h₆ : ∀ N : ℕ, a (n + N) ≤ La := h₃
      have h₇ : a n ≤ a (n + 0) := by
        have h₈ : a n ≤ a (n + 0) := by
          have h₉ : ∀ N : ℕ, a n ≤ a (n + N) := h₂
          have h₁₀ : a n ≤ a (n + 0) := h₉ 0
          exact h₁₀
        exact h₈
      have h₈ : a (n + 0) ≤ La := h₆ 0
      linarith
    exact h₄
  exact h₁

sorry
  obtain ⟨ε, εpos, hε⟩ := h₂
  have h₃ : ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ k : ℕ, k ≥ N → |a k - La| < ε := by sorry
  obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := h₃
  have h₄ := hN (max n N) (by simp [le_max_right])
  have h₅ : a (max n N) ≥ a n := by sorry
  have h₆ : |a (max n N) - La| < ε := by sorry
  have h₇ : a (max n N) - La < ε := by sorry
  have h₈ : a (max n N) ≥ a n := by sorry
  have h₉ : a n - La > ε := by sorry
